title: Golden Brown German Savoy Cabbage Gratin
description: A savory and crunchy German dish featuring blanched savoy cabbage, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the blanched savoy cabbage to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and garlic
In a separate saucepan, warm the cream over low heat
Stir in the grated cheese until melted and smooth
Add the cheese sauce to the skillet with the cabbage and stir to combine
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Transfer the cabbage mixture to the preheated tandoor clay pot
Dot the top with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter
